name: Crab Stuffed Mushroom Caps
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare mushroom caps by setting the stems aside for another use.
2. Mix together the crab meat, egg, 1/4 cup breadcrumbs, tomato juice, lemon juice, tabasco, onion, celery, and salt.
3. Fill each mushroom cap with the mixture.
4. Toss the remaining 1/2 cup of breadcrumbs with the melted butter. Sprinkle over the mushroom caps.
5. Place the caps on a baking sheet and broil until golden and bubbly.
